# Feature: Voicebox character-voice UX fixes

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-12 — do not edit manually unless correcting intent -->

## Intent

Fix stale Kokoro-centric copy in the Characters voice section and auto-launch Voicebox on desktop when it is the default TTS engine but not yet reachable — matching Kokoro sidecar UX with progress feedback.

## Preconditions

- Desktop app (`npm run dev:desktop`) with local runtime and an open `.scriptony` project
- Default engine is Voicebox (`VITE_DEFAULT_VOICE_ENGINE` unset or `voicebox`)
- Voicebox app installed on macOS (for auto-launch MVP)

## Happy Path

- [ ] Characters section banner (no cloud session) mentions Voicebox as local engine, not Kokoro
- [ ] Character voice row resolves voice name via `useTtsVoiceProfiles` (Voicebox profiles when default)
- [ ] Preview voice with Voicebox stopped: Scriptony attempts `open -a Voicebox`, shows global loading progress, then plays preview
- [ ] Voice profile picker loads Voicebox profiles after auto-launch when app was not running
- [ ] Voice preview progress title/id uses engine-neutral or Voicebox-aware labels (not hardcoded "kokoro")

## Edge Cases

- [ ] Voicebox already running: no duplicate launch; health check passes immediately
- [ ] Voicebox not installed / launch fails: clear German error with manual-start hint
- [ ] Non-macOS desktop: auto-launch skipped with manual-start message (no crash)
- [ ] `VITE_DEFAULT_VOICE_ENGINE=kokoro`: Kokoro path unchanged; banner still accurate for active engine
- [ ] Optional `VITE_VOICEBOX_APP_NAME` when app bundle name differs from "Voicebox"

## Regression

- [ ] Kokoro-as-default still auto-starts sidecar and lists voices
- [ ] Cloud-TTS gating unchanged when cloud session active
- [ ] Character voice editor modal still loads profiles

## Assumptions

- Voicebox macOS app name defaults to `Voicebox`; override via `VITE_VOICEBOX_APP_NAME` passed to Tauri invoke
- Auto-launch MVP is macOS-only via `open -a`; other platforms require manual start
- Voicebox HTTP API remains `GET /profiles` on port 17493 (configurable via `VITE_VOICEBOX_BASE_URL`)

## Implementation Notes

- Files touched: `src-tauri/src/commands/voicebox.rs`, `src/lib/voicebox/voicebox-loading-progress.ts`, `src/lib/api/voicebox-api.ts`, `src/hooks/useTtsVoiceProfiles.ts`, `src/hooks/useMveVoicePreview.ts`, `src/components/characters/CharacterVoiceRow.tsx`, `src/components/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx`, `src/lib/mve/play-voice-preview.ts`, docs + tests
- Unit tests: `voicebox-api.test.ts`, `voicebox-loading-progress.test.ts`
- Auto-launch: macOS only via Tauri `start_voicebox_app`; optional `VITE_VOICEBOX_APP_NAME` / Rust `VOICEBOX_APP_NAME`
